HERO.TAGLINE: // Just a software developer trying to keep things simple.
HERO.DESCRIPTION: Developer passionate about creating high-impact digital experiences with Angular, micro front-end architecture, and code that scales.

ABOUT.P1: Software developer with 3+ years of experience, passionate about high-performance front-end with a focus on Angular and scalable architectures. I turn complex requirements into fluid interfaces and code that any dev enjoys maintaining.
ABOUT.P2: My experience ranges from enterprise systems at AB InBev to urban mobility platforms at Mottu — always with an obsession for quality, performance, and best practices.
ABOUT.P3: I believe simplicity is the greatest sign of technical mastery.

FOCUS.LABEL: What I'm working on
FOCUS.ITEM_1: Angular apps that stay fast even as they grow
FOCUS.ITEM_2: Front-end architecture that won't become a problem 6 months from now
FOCUS.ITEM_4: Code organization with evolution in mind, not just delivery

APPROACH.LABEL: How I work
APPROACH.ITEM_1: I prefer simple solutions that solve the problem well
APPROACH.ITEM_2: I avoid unnecessary complexity from the start
APPROACH.ITEM_3: I think about the medium-term impact of decisions

NTT.DESCRIPTION: Fullstack Developer on AB InBev's Process Hygiene Management system. Micro front-end architecture with Angular 19, .NET/C# APIs, xUnit testing, Redis and Azure integration.

MOTTU.DESCRIPTION: Complex interfaces with Angular 13 and Angular Material. Internal component library for the maintenance team. Fullstack work with NestJS and .NET. Observability with Datadog and pipelines with GitHub Actions.

BIOMA.DESCRIPTION: Sole front-end developer for dairy sector systems using ReactJS and NextJS. Focus on componentization, state management, and responsiveness.

RESTAURANT.DESCRIPTION: Complete restaurant management system with operational backoffice, public QR Code menu, own delivery, real-time orders via Socket.IO, Excel reports, and AI insights (Gemini). Deployed to production.

ALIGNMENT.DESCRIPTION: Interactive showcase with 33 sections and 7 categories for discussing Angular best practices with the China hub. Compares anti-patterns and recommended approaches with live demos covering performance, reactivity, architecture, security, and DX.

SALES.DESCRIPTION: REST API in .NET 8 with Clean Architecture and DDD for managing sales, products, cart, and users. Includes volume discount rules, JWT authentication, CQRS with MediatR, pagination, and tests with xUnit and NSubstitute.

CONTACT.DESCRIPTION: I enjoy exchanging ideas about technology, collaborating on interesting projects, or just having a conversation about dev.
